chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "قَالَ اَللَّهُ جَلَّ جَلاَلُهُ "أَيُّمَا عَبْدٍ أَطَاعَنِي لَمْ أَكِلْهُ إِلَى غَيْرِي وَ أَيُّمَا عَبْدٍ عَصَانِي وَكَلْتُهُ إِلَى نَفْسِهِ ثُمَّ لَمْ أُبَالِ فِي أَيِّ وَادٍ هَلَكَ" ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5869 - Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, said:
"Allah (swt), the Glorified and Exalted, said:
'Whoever of My (swt) servants obeys Me (swt), I will not entrust him to anyone other than Myself (swt). And whoever disobeys Me (swt), I will leave him to himself, and I will not care in which valley he perishes.'"
